description_long: This is a large, conical metal bucket with a dark, weathered finish, giving it an industrial and utilitarian appearance. The bucket features a single metal wire bail handle, which is attached to the rim on opposite sides and includes a cylindrical wooden grip for comfortable carrying. The surface of the bucket is slightly reflective, showing signs of wear and subtle texture variations, suggesting it has been used outdoors or in rugged environments. The rim is wide and open, with no visible lid or cover, and the interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids or materials. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for tasks such as carrying water, sand, or debris in urban or industrial settings.
description: A large, conical metal bucket with a dark, weathered finish and a metal wire bail handle with a wooden grip. The bucket is open-topped, sturdy, and utilitarian, ideal for carrying materials in urban or industrial environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, open rim and the smooth, dark metal surface with no handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing part of the metal wire handle and the wooden grip protruding from the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full metal wire bail handle with the wooden grip centered and clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle and wooden grip visible on the left side, similar to view 1 but mirrored.
attribute_handle_type: metal wire bail with wooden grip
